flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Green River College rose 39% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $11.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Green River College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.6k vs 5.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Green River College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3k → 5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Green River College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
